programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Home Study
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler fuss over their apartment as they expect a visit from the adoption worker, Laura; Phoebe and Mike opt for a small wedding and donate the extra money to a children's charity.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Late Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Monica prepares a Thanksgiving feast for the gang, then becomes enraged when everyone shows up late; Phoebe convinces Rachel to enter Emma in a baby beauty contest.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Birth Mother
programme.desc: A prospective birth mother (Anna Faris) labors under a misconception about Monica and Chandler's respective occupations.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
programme.desc: Rachel and Phoebe spot Chandler getting into a car with a mystery blonde; the friends reminisce about memorable moments.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where the Stripper Cries
programme.desc: Joey appears as a celebrity contestant on "$100,000 Pyramid"; Monica and Rachel hire an ungainly stripper for Phoebe's bachelorette party.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: A blizzard causes Phoebe and Mike's wedding to spiral out of control; uptight Monica steps in as her friend's wedding planner, then drives everyone crazy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Speaks French
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler show Erica the tourist sights; they learn their baby's biological father might be an unsavory character; Joey begs Phoebe to teach him how to speak French before an audition.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel goes to a job interview at a restaurant and winds up sitting next to her current boss; Joey feels abandoned because Monica and Chandler are leaving.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross tries to win back Rachel's job with her former fashion employer; Phoebe tries to keep Joey from learning about his agent's death; Monica and Chandler make a horrifying discovery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Rachel's Going Away Party
programme.desc: One of the guys becomes offended when Rachel does not give him the same goodbye she gives the others.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The six friends prepare to say goodbye and embark on the next chapters of their lives; momentous events and last-minute surprises.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The six friends prepare to say goodbye and embark on the next chapters of their lives; momentous events and last-minute surprises.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica's high-school friend visits after leaving her fiancé at the altar.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Sonogram at the End
programme.desc: Monica begins to feel the heat when she prepares dinner for her parents (Elliott Gould, Christina Pickles).

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent finds out his parents never married; Lacey's mission to help Oscar.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Davis regains sense of smell; Brent realizes how little he knows about his friends.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags
programme.desc: There's no sound, but there sure are plenty of laughs; Quebec-based troupe uses the city as its stage, and its inhabitants, or victims, as characters.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags
programme.desc: There's no sound, but there sure are plenty of laughs. This crazy Quebec-based troupe uses the city as its stage, and its inhabitants, or victims, as characters! People are caught in a twisted yet funny web of comedic deception. This updated "Candid Camera" is a tad more risque and a little kookier with its practical jokes. The little snippets last only a few minutes, and some look more painful than others.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting members of the public climbing into an apparently normal taxicab, only to find themselves on national television, with a chance to win a small fortune; hosted by Adam Growe.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unassuming people enter a taxi cab as simple passengers taking a normal ride, only to be shocked when they discover that they're contestants. The driver/host, Adam Grove, asks the passengers trivia questions as he takes them to their destination.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent finds out his parents never married; Lacey's mission to help Oscar.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Davis regains sense of smell; Brent realizes how little he knows about his friends.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags
programme.desc: There's no sound, but there sure are plenty of laughs; Quebec-based troupe uses the city as its stage, and its inhabitants, or victims, as characters.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.desc: There's no sound, but there sure are plenty of laughs. This crazy Quebec-based troupe uses the city as its stage, and its inhabitants, or victims, as characters! People are caught in a twisted yet funny web of comedic deception. This updated "Candid Camera" is a tad more risque and a little kookier with its practical jokes. The little snippets last only a few minutes, and some look more painful than others.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Smoking Penguins and Santa on Santa Action
programme.desc: Dan is disappointed when everyone but Becky forgets about his birthday; Darlene faces another issue; Dan excludes Jackie from the family Christmas Santa photo for mistreating Louise.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags
programme.desc: Construction site knock-out, a janitor escorting people on a wet floor, a tropical sand blown away and more.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A brilliant but reclusive scientist, Doctor Wolcott, invites Sheldon to his cabin in the middle of nowhere; Penny and Bernadette improvise after Amy doesn't like the tame bachelorette party they planned for her.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's comic book store experience changes when writer Neil Gaiman puts Stuart's store on the map; friendships are threatened when Koothrappali takes credit for Penny's astronomical discovery.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon goes to Las Vegas to win money for science; Penny and Bernadette take Amy wedding dress shopping, but her terrible choice entangles them in a web of lies.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Smoking Penguins and Santa on Santa Action
programme.desc: Dan is disappointed when everyone but Becky forgets about his birthday; Darlene faces another issue; Dan excludes Jackie from the family Christmas Santa photo for mistreating Louise.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Throwing a Christian to a Bear
programme.desc: The Conners struggle to accept Becky's new boyfriend, a Green Bay Packers fan; Dan tries to impress upon Mark the importance of the family's die-hard loyalty to the Bears; Ben and Darlene try to get a loan for their new magazine.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: After Doug convinces Carrie he doesn't goof around at work, horseplay gets him into a painful and embarrassing predicament.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Deacon and Kelly ask Doug and Carrie to be the godparents of their new baby; Arthur is put in charge of the pretzel shop.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug gets upset with Carrie after his big-screen TV set is stolen because she accidentally left the garage door open.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug feels so guilty about putting down Arthur that he gives him one of his Mets tickets; Doug gets arrested trying to catch a foul ball.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's mother won't attend his wedding unless he invites his brother; the Wolowitz kids inadvertently infest Amy, Bernadette, Wolowitz and Koothrappali with pink eye.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Trades
programme.desc: The Trades is a single-cam sitcom about refinery employees that balance the conflicting personalities of a small town with the antics of a stressful workplace.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar asks for Karen's help in getting culinary revenge against Emma.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Karen drives everyone crazy with her new hacky-sack; Oscar finds a pair of pants.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Wanda goes power mad; Davis and Karen make a dangerous bet; Oscar recalls "the incident" that made him give up the game for good; Brent and Hank are lost in the woods.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Wanda creates her dream video game; Lacey and Karen offer to help Davis release his pent-up stress; Oscar and Emma break out the crokinole board.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting members of the public climbing into an apparently normal taxicab, only to find themselves on national television, with a chance to win a small fortune; hosted by Adam Growe.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Mud Turtles, a Good Steak and One Man in a Tub
programme.desc: Becky thinks that Jackie's new friend, a restaurant supplier, is taking advantage of them; Darlene is thrilled when Harris gets into Central Illinois State, but Harris might have found a better offer; Dan finds himself in an embarrassing situation.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Amy's parents and Sheldon's family arrive, everybody is focused on making sure the wedding arrangements go according to plan -- everyone except the bride and groom.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's honeymoon runs aground in New York; Penny and Leonard discover they are uncomfortably similar to Amy's parents; Koothrappali insults physicist Neil deGrasse Tyson and starts a Twitter war.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy go crazy trying to figure out what "perfect gift" Leonard and Penny gave them for their wedding; Koothrappali decides to settle down and asks his father to arrange a marriage for him.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Conners
programme.sub-title: Mud Turtles, a Good Steak and One Man in a Tub
programme.desc: Becky thinks that Jackie's new friend, a restaurant supplier, is taking advantage of them; Darlene is thrilled when Harris gets into Central Illinois State, but Harris might have found a better offer; Dan finds himself in an embarrassing situation.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dan avoids coping with a death in the family, only to be confronted by it head-on; Ben and Darlene address Ben's baby fever; Dwight gets the jitters when he has to fill in for the chef who suffers an accident.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica finds it difficult to break up with her latest boyfriend (Geoffrey Lower), whom everyone likes; Chandler starts smoking again; Phoebe receives a large sum of money.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: While the men attend a hockey game and end up at a hospital, the women spy on President Clinton's top aide, George Stephanopoulos, who lives across the street.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the East German Laundry Detergent
programme.desc: Chandler and Phoebe plan to dump dates on the same night at the same coffee house.

programme.title: Georgie & Mandy's First Marriage
programme.sub-title: Alpha Males and the Power of Prayer
programme.desc: Mandy tries to make things right with Pastor Jeff when she learns her controversial comments have hurt the tire store's business; Jim and Audrey butt heads over Connor's allowance.
